markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review LLM performance data to align on strategy and address internal concerns.](https://fathom.video/share/xjFcJegzAGsJjPktjzp8LP41hKdanAq2?tab=summary&timestamp=1120.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - **Strong Early Signals:** Prophecy is outranking Alteryx on key queries (e.g., \#5 vs. \#13 visibility) and capturing high citation share (20%), validating the content strategy.
  - [**Internal Pressure:** Raj is focused on Alteryx competitor queries after a VP candidate highlighted Prophecy's low ranking in a ChatGPT search, creating urgency to show progress.](https://fathom.video/share/xjFcJegzAGsJjPktjzp8LP41hKdanAq2?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)
  - [**Technical Blocker:** A persistent schema issue is preventing content from being indexed by Google, directly hindering LLM visibility and requiring immediate resolution.](https://fathom.video/share/xjFcJegzAGsJjPktjzp8LP41hKdanAq2?tab=summary&timestamp=2436.0)
  - [**Strategic Path:** Cody will use the new data to brief Raj, approve Alteryx-focused content, and escalate the technical fix to unblock performance.](https://fathom.video/share/xjFcJegzAGsJjPktjzp8LP41hKdanAq2?tab=summary&timestamp=2745.0)

## Topics

### Internal Pressure & Performance Focus

  - [**Context:** Raj's focus on Alteryx competitor queries intensified after a VP candidate used a ChatGPT search to challenge Prophecy's relevance during an interview.](https://fathom.video/share/xjFcJegzAGsJjPktjzp8LP41hKdanAq2?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)
  - [**Goal:** Use the new performance data to brief Raj, demonstrate progress, and secure buy-in for the current strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/xjFcJegzAGsJjPktjzp8LP41hKdanAq2?tab=summary&timestamp=2745.0)
  - [**Plan:** Marcel will email Raj directly to introduce the strategy. Cody will then follow up to schedule a call if needed.](https://fathom.video/share/xjFcJegzAGsJjPktjzp8LP41hKdanAq2?tab=summary&timestamp=83.0)

### LLM Performance & Validation

  - [**Tool:** GrowthX's new "Check That" tool provides real-time LLM visibility data.](https://fathom.video/share/xjFcJegzAGsJjPktjzp8LP41hKdanAq2?tab=summary&timestamp=1152.0)
  - [**Key Wins:**](https://fathom.video/share/xjFcJegzAGsJjPktjzp8LP41hKdanAq2?tab=summary&timestamp=1177.0)
      - [**Alteryx Competitor Query:** Outranks Alteryx on a key topic.](https://fathom.video/share/xjFcJegzAGsJjPktjzp8LP41hKdanAq2?tab=summary&timestamp=1177.0)
          - Prophecy: \#5 rank, 15% visibility
          - Alteryx: \#13 rank, 8% visibility
      - [**High Citation Share:** Capturing significant share on specific pages.](https://fathom.video/share/xjFcJegzAGsJjPktjzp8LP41hKdanAq2?tab=summary&timestamp=1424.0)
          - [`weigh your options as you move off Alteryx`: 20% citation share](https://fathom.video/share/xjFcJegzAGsJjPktjzp8LP41hKdanAq2?tab=summary&timestamp=1424.0)
          - [`best Databricks integration data platforms`: 40% citation share](https://fathom.video/share/xjFcJegzAGsJjPktjzp8LP41hKdanAq2?tab=summary&timestamp=1317.0)
      - [**Broad Topic Authority:** Ranks for a broad, non-direct query, showing the content strategy is building general authority.](https://fathom.video/share/xjFcJegzAGsJjPktjzp8LP41hKdanAq2?tab=summary&timestamp=1756.0)
          - [Query: `how can you reduce reliance on data engineers?`](https://fathom.video/share/xjFcJegzAGsJjPktjzp8LP41hKdanAq2?tab=summary&timestamp=1699.0)
          - [Citation: Links to the main blog page, a strong signal of site-wide authority.](https://fathom.video/share/xjFcJegzAGsJjPktjzp8LP41hKdanAq2?tab=summary&timestamp=1722.0)

### Strategy for Alteryx Content

  - [**Goal:** Dominate the "unhappy Alteryx user" search intent.](https://fathom.video/share/xjFcJegzAGsJjPktjzp8LP41hKdanAq2?tab=summary&timestamp=2195.0)
  - [**Method:** Create a cluster of content around common Alteryx pain points (e.g., crashes, complexity) to capture users seeking alternatives.](https://fathom.video/share/xjFcJegzAGsJjPktjzp8LP41hKdanAq2?tab=summary&timestamp=2223.0)
  - [**Competitive Analysis:** New content will be designed to compete directly with currently cited articles for target queries.](https://fathom.video/share/xjFcJegzAGsJjPktjzp8LP41hKdanAq2?tab=summary&timestamp=2343.0)

### Technical Blocker: Schema Issue

  - [**Problem:** A persistent schema issue is preventing Google from indexing new content.](https://fathom.video/share/xjFcJegzAGsJjPktjzp8LP41hKdanAq2?tab=summary&timestamp=2436.0)
  - [**Impact:** This directly blocks content from appearing in LLM results, hindering performance.](https://fathom.video/share/xjFcJegzAGsJjPktjzp8LP41hKdanAq2?tab=summary&timestamp=2436.0)
  - [**Status:** The issue was reported as fixed but is still present, with multiple pages showing as "discovered, not indexed."](https://fathom.video/share/xjFcJegzAGsJjPktjzp8LP41hKdanAq2?tab=summary&timestamp=2436.0)
  - [**Action:** Cody will escalate the fix with the contractor, using specific URLs from Carrie to demonstrate the failure.](https://fathom.video/share/xjFcJegzAGsJjPktjzp8LP41hKdanAq2?tab=summary&timestamp=2591.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Carrie:**](https://fathom.video/share/xjFcJegzAGsJjPktjzp8LP41hKdanAq2?tab=summary&timestamp=2666.0)
      - [Send Cody specific URLs with schema errors.](https://fathom.video/share/xjFcJegzAGsJjPktjzp8LP41hKdanAq2?tab=summary&timestamp=2666.0)
      - [Send Cody the revised content artifacts for review.](https://fathom.video/share/xjFcJegzAGsJjPktjzp8LP41hKdanAq2?tab=summary&timestamp=2787.0)
      - [Monitor Raj's response to Marcel's email.](https://fathom.video/share/xjFcJegzAGsJjPktjzp8LP41hKdanAq2?tab=summary&timestamp=2838.0)
  - [**Cody:**](https://fathom.video/share/xjFcJegzAGsJjPktjzp8LP41hKdanAq2?tab=summary&timestamp=2745.0)
      - [Brief the marketing team on LLM performance data.](https://fathom.video/share/xjFcJegzAGsJjPktjzp8LP41hKdanAq2?tab=summary&timestamp=2745.0)
      - [Approve the first batch of Alteryx-focused content topics.](https://fathom.video/share/xjFcJegzAGsJjPktjzp8LP41hKdanAq2?tab=summary&timestamp=2380.0)
      - [Escalate the schema fix with the contractor.](https://fathom.video/share/xjFcJegzAGsJjPktjzp8LP41hKdanAq2?tab=summary&timestamp=2591.0)
